title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: Programming language choice significantly impacts AI team productivity, particularly as team size grows. The video argues that static typing, Language Server Protocols (LSPs), and compile-time checks catch errors early and improve AI-assisted development, with TypeScript recommended over dynamic languages like Python for reducing friction and runtime mistakes.
